violations.description: Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was reused or used more than one time. -Observed single use cup being used as a scoop in sugar bin.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed textured ceiling in food prep area that is neither smooth, nor cleanable.
